properties.property: [ { "name": "", "text": "Several gravediggers gather around a pedestal which contains nothing but the broken feet of a statue. 'Ey you! You look like some kinda hero! Help us poor folks out whydontcha!'", "options": [ { "name": "All three pieces of your magic statue, just like you wanted.", "text": "The gravediggers slot the pieces back together and with the careful application of some foul-smelling black goo, they're held back in place surprisingly well. 'Good as new! Thank ya mightily for yer service!'", "action": [ { "deleteMapObject": -1 }, {"grantRewards": [ {"type": "life", "count": 1}, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Orbs of Warding", "count": 1 }, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Grafdigger's Cage", "count": 1 }, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Grave Expectations", "count": 1 }, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Graveshifter", "count": 1 }, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Graveyard Trespasser", "count": 1 }, { "type": "card", "cardName": "Guardian Idol", "count": 1 }, {"type": "gold", "count": 1500} ] }, {"removeItem":"Warding Statue Torso"}, {"removeItem":"Warding Statue Skirt"}, {"removeItem":"Warding Statue Arms"}, {"addMapReputation": 2} ], "condition":[{"item":"Warding Statue Torso"}, {"item":"Warding Statue Skirt"}, {"item":"Warding Statue Arms"}], "options": [ { "name": "(Continue)" } ] }, { "name": "I'm certainly SOME kind of hero, sure.", "text": "'As you can see, our precious warding statue, that keeps all'a these here dead folk in our graveyard sleepin' all peaceful got shattered! Pieces got stolen too! Without it, there's gonna be a real crisis come the next new moon.'", "options": [ { "name": "So who took the pieces?", "text": "'Buncha nasty folks from Innistrad. Pretty but crazy lady by the name'a Gisa, mean science type called Geralf, and some zombie-looking dude goes by Wilhelt. They're over in a big graveyard of their own somewhere. Pretty sure they each got a piece. Get us back all three and you'll have our sincere gratitude, and I'm pretty sure we can dig up some kinda monetary reward ta boot.'", "options": [ { "name": "Your statue is as good as fixed." } ] }] }, { "name": "You've got the wrong adventurer, I'm afraid.", "text": "'Anotha unkind soul. I knew I shoulda moved to the forest capitol.'", "options": [ { "name": "(Continue)" } ] } ] } ]
